title: phanera platycalyx
intro: Phanera platycalyx, also known as the 'Indian Cork Tree', is a species of plant in the family Moraceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phanera platycalyx include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and can also be used in the form of extracts or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
